name: NBABetting
short: NBA betting with injury-aware odds, player props, and auto-settlement.
description: Full NBA betting cog. Real game schedules and injury reports from ESPN (no API key needed), injury-adjusted odds, player prop bets (pts/reb/ast/PRA), per-guild economy, auto-settlement with box-score verification, leaderboard, admin controls, and interactive slash-command UI with confirmation dialogs.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-user economy balances and bet history (user ID, amounts, picks) per guild. Data can be cleared by a guild admin at any time.
install_msg:
**NBABetting setup:**
1. Load the cog — no API key required. Odds and injury data come from ESPN for free.
2. Optionally set an admin role: `/admin setrole @Role`.
3. Optionally set a results channel: `/admin notifychannel #channel`.

All games, odds, injury reports, and box scores are pulled from ESPN automatically.
author: jaffar21
